positive: Minimalist bohemian forest creature illustration, a majestic, stylized fox with flowing tail and delicate woodland accents, rendered in a clean, thick-lined, linocut woodcut style. The fox is leaping gracefully through abstract, stylized forest elements like crescent moons, simple ferns, and geometric flora. Composition must be centered and perfectly balanced for seamless textile printing. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep forest green, burnt ochre, warm terracotta, and rich cream white. Strong, high-contrast black and white outlines are essential. Vector graphic quality, suitable for direct apparel sublimation print, 8k resolution.
